name: licensing_cle
description: a professional licensing and CLE-credit tracking world; actions accrue_credits, renew, lapse

card.description: a professional licensing and CLE-credit tracking world; actions accrue_credits, renew, lapse

rules: A license is either 'active' or 'lapsed'. Only an active license may accrue CLE credits or be renewed.

accrue_credits logs completed CLE hours (from a perceived filing's pending_credits, an explicit `amount` param, or a 4-hour default) onto an active license and advances the calendar 30 days, consuming the compliance period.
If the compliance period reaches zero before renewal, the license automatically lapses and lapsed_count increments.

renew succeeds only when the license is active and credits_earned >= credits_required; on success it charges a fee, increments renewals, zeroes credits_earned, and resets period_days_remaining to a fresh 730-day window. Otherwise it is a no-op.
lapse immediately marks an active license 'lapsed', zeroes outstanding credits, ends the compliance period, and increments lapsed_count.
Monotonic counters never decrease: day, renewals, fees_paid, and lapsed_count only ever rise.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}
    active = s["license_status"] == "active"

    if name == "accrue_credits":
        # Credits can come from a perceived filing (pending_credits) or an
        # explicit `amount`; default to a single 4-hour course.
        amount = params.get("amount")
        if amount is None:
            amount = s["pending_credits"] if s["pending_credits"] > 0 else 4.0
        amount = max(0.0, float(amount))
        if active:
            s["credits_earned"] = round(s["credits_earned"] + amount, 2)
            s["day"] = s["day"] + 30
            s["period_days_remaining"] = max(0, s["period_days_remaining"] - 30)
            # A blown deadline with the period exhausted lapses the license.
            if s["period_days_remaining"] == 0:
                s["license_status"] = "lapsed"
                s["lapsed_count"] = s["lapsed_count"] + 1
        s["pending_credits"] = 0.0

    elif name == "renew":
        fee = max(0.0, float(params.get("fee", 350.0)))
        if active and s["credits_earned"] >= s["credits_required"]:
            s["renewals"] = s["renewals"] + 1
            s["fees_paid"] = round(s["fees_paid"] + fee, 2)
            s["credits_earned"] = 0.0          # reset for the next period
            s["period_days_remaining"] = 730   # fresh two-year compliance window

    elif name == "lapse":
        if active:
            s["license_status"] = "lapsed"
            s["lapsed_count"] = s["lapsed_count"] + 1
            s["credits_earned"] = 0.0
            s["period_days_remaining"] = 0

    return s

emit.report: License is {license_status}. CLE progress: {credits_earned} of {credits_required} credits with {period_days_remaining} days left in the period. Renewals to date: {renewals} (fees paid ${fees_paid}); lapses: {lapsed_count}.
